reviews.review_msg: I've had Tiffany as my professor three times now (204, 319, 350) for a reason. She actively engages her students and encourages feedback. She gets the class talking as a group. As well, she is a super fair marker and gives lots of time to ask for questions. She cares about her students and wants everyone to do well. Definitely would recommend.

This was a class I picked up because I couldn't get into another GSWS and it ended up being my favourite of the semester! Professor Cohen is such a sweet woman and fantastic lecturer, and she also has a great sense of humour. Classes were a bit heavy on group work (thankfully my group was great!) and you must not skip any readings! Fabulous prof!
